mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders ( member_id, status, subtotal, shipping_fee, tax, coupon_discount, points_used, total_amount, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{status}, #{subtotal}, #{shippingFee}, #{tax}, #{couponDiscount}, #{pointsUsed}, #{totalAmount}, #{updatedBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT order_id, member_id, order_date, status, subtotal, shipping_fee, tax, coupon_discount, points_used, total_amount, updated_by, created_at FROM orders WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
